objective: Optimize perf_takehome.py to reduce CYCLES below baseline while preserving correctness.
invariants: Must preserve exact output of reference_kernel2
Must not modify problem.py or tests/
Must keep N_CORES=1 and multicore disabled
Must respect SLOT_LIMITS for all generated instructions
Must maintain pause/debug alignment with reference kernel
known_facts: Machine.run executes the instructions and counts cycles
HASH_STAGES defines the hash function stages
SLOT_LIMITS restricts parallelism per engine type
